description_long: This is a small, cylindrical cup with a smooth, glossy surface and a single rounded handle attached to one side. The cup is predominantly white or light blue in color, with a handwritten-style text reading 'ZEDA' and a small star graphic on the front. The handle is ergonomically shaped for easy gripping, and the rim is slightly thickened for comfort. The cup's body is seamless and appears to be made of ceramic or porcelain, giving it a sturdy and durable feel. There are no visible cracks, chips, or additional decorative patterns aside from the text and star, and the interior is clean and unadorned.
description: A small, glossy white cup with a rounded handle and handwritten 'ZEDA' text with a star on the front. The surface is smooth and the cup appears sturdy and ceramic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handle on the left and the 'ZEDA' text with a star graphic clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle not visible and only a partial glimpse of the text and star on the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view with the handle on the right and no visible text or graphics, showing the plain back of the cup.
description_view_3: Side view with the handle centered and no visible text, focusing on the handle's attachment to the cup.
